task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the 'OSINT-Research' Edge profile.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Microsoft Edge profile flyout menu or the 'Profiles' settings page showing a profile explicitly named 'OSINT-Research'.

task_completion.description: Verify Tracking Prevention is 'Strict' and 'Do Not Track' is enabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for Edge's 'Privacy, search, and services' settings page. The 'Strict' box under Tracking prevention must be selected, and the toggle for 'Send Do Not Track requests' must be turned on.

task_completion.description: Verify password saving and personal info autofill are disabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for Edge's Profile settings pages. The toggles for 'Offer to save passwords' (under Passwords) and 'Save and fill basic info' / 'Save and fill custom info' (under Personal info) must be turned off.

task_completion.description: Verify startup pages are set to the required OSINT URLs.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for Edge's 'Start, home, and new tabs' settings page. The option 'Open these pages' should be selected, with 'https://osintframework.com' and 'https://www.shodan.io' listed as the startup pages.

task_completion.description: Verify the configuration report text file was created with the settings documented.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a text editor or terminal output showing the contents of '/home/ga/Desktop/osint_profile_config.txt'. The document must list or summarize the applied settings (Strict tracking, Do Not Track, disabled passwords/autofill, and the two startup URLs).

integrity.description: Ensure the agent interacted with the Microsoft Edge GUI to configure settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the actual Microsoft Edge browser windows and settings pages being navigated, rather than just terminal commands modifying browser preference files.

integrity.description: Ensure the configuration report is saved to the correct path.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for evidence that the file is actually saved at '/home/ga/Desktop/osint_profile_config.txt' (e.g., the file path in a text editor's title bar, a terminal 'cat' command, or the file icon visible on the Desktop).

integrity.description: Ensure the agent didn't just write the report without applying the settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: There must be screenshots showing the Edge settings actually being changed in the browser, not just a text file claiming they were changed.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target profile name: 'OSINT-Research'. Report path: '/home/ga/Desktop/osint_profile_config.txt'. Required startup URLs: 'osintframework.com' and 'shodan.io'.
